sources.title: Palau the Movie - The young years of the world-famous preacher (BIOPIC films based on real events)

metadata.Plot: A story of relentless grit, motivational strength and humbling triumph, PALAU is a film many will relate to. As a young man, a passion and vision to proclaim the Good News of Jesus to all the nations was planted deep in Luis Palau's heart. Amidst both seemingly insurmountable struggles and remarkable miracles, Luis never lost sight of his calling. His extraordinary story will bring hope to the masses and encourage all that God has greatness in store for them.
metadata.Actors: Gastón Pauls, Santiago Achaga, Agustin Amoedo
